name: HTTP Request (curl)
description: Make an HTTP request using curl. Supports GET/POST/PUT/DELETE with headers and body.

executor_template.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess
args = json.load(sys.stdin)
url = args.get('url', '')
method = args.get('method', 'GET').upper()
headers = args.get('headers', {})
body = args.get('body', '')
timeout = str(args.get('timeout', 30))
if not url:
    print(json.dumps({'success': False, 'error': 'url is required'})); sys.exit(0)
cmd = ['curl', '-s', '-X', method, '-w', '\\n---STATUS:%{http_code}', '--max-time', timeout]
for k, v in headers.items():
    cmd += ['-H', f'{k}: {v}']
if body:
    cmd += ['-d', body]
cmd.append(url)
result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
out = result.stdout
status = ''
if '---STATUS:' in out:
    out, status = out.rsplit('---STATUS:', 1)
print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'status_code': int(status) if status.strip().isdigit() else None, 'body': out.strip(), 'stderr': result.stderr.strip()}))
"
